label: ProxLab: Smart Alerting
info: Listens for ProxLab agent invocation events and routes them based on success/failure. Failed invocations trigger an AI-powered diagnosis.

name: Build Diagnosis Request
Setup: Configure server on both proxlab nodes, replace debug outputs with notifications
info:
1. Configure the ProxLab server on both the 'Agent Events' listener and 'Diagnose Failure' invoke nodes
2. Optionally set a filter agent on the listener to only monitor specific agents
3. Replace debug output nodes with actual notification services
